<section class="about" id="about">

    <div class="about-visual">
      <div class="about-logo-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Tsunami Guitars">
        <div class="about-ring"></div>
        <div class="about-ring-2"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-text">
      <div class="section-eyebrow">About Tsunami Guitars</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Specialists in<br><em>Japanese Guitars</em></h2>
      <div class="section-rule" style="margin-left:0;"></div>
      <p>Tsunami Guitars was founded on a simple belief: the guitars built in Japan during the 1970s, '80s, and beyond represent some of the greatest instruments ever made — and the world deserves to know about them.</p>
      <p>We source, authenticate, and sell a carefully curated selection of Japanese guitars — from rare vintage pieces to the finest modern Japanese production instruments. Every guitar we sell is personally inspected and set up to play its best.</p>
      <p>Whether you're chasing a vintage Tokai that rivals your favourite '59, or looking for a brand-new Momose built to last another fifty years, we're here to help you find it.</p>
      <div class="about-stats">
        <div class="stat-box">
